title: Top Categories By Order Count
description: Retrieve categories along with their total order count and return the top 2 categories with the highest counts. If multiple categories tie on count, break ties by category in ascending alphabetical order.
sql_solution: SELECT category, COUNT(*) count FROM orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC, category ASC LIMIT 2;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.groupBy("category")
    .agg(count(lit(1)).alias("count"))
    .orderBy(col("count").desc(), col("category").asc())
    .limit(2)
)
